title: The Ultimate Solopreneur Agent Harness for AI Builders (Claude Code Harness)
summary: Ron Demerit's Claude Code Harness is a "Solopreneur Rig" featuring 16 specialized sub-agents, a product manager orchestrator, and session-locking for isolated client work. The harness improves context engineering, token efficiency, and separation of concerns compared to raw Claude Code usage.
